series_metadata.series_description: Records pertaining to Family Medical Leave Act (FMLA), workers' compensation, disability leave, EAP agreements, disability retirement, salary continuation, transitional work program, disability accommodation requests, and other medical records not covered by another schedule.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned electronically, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 7 years from effective date of employee separation, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
